mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_task_publish_record (task_id, task_version_id, source_env, target_env, publish_type, before_version_id, after_version_id, remark, operator_id) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskVersionId}, #{sourceEnv}, #{targetEnv}, #{publishType}, #{beforeVersionId}, #{afterVersionId}, #{remark}, #{operatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, task_version_id, source_env, target_env, publish_type, before_version_id, after_version_id, remark, operator_id FROM df_task_publish_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY operated_at DESC, id DESC
